visual_description: A woman wearing headphones sits at a desk with a laptop, looking at the screen while a man in a light shirt stands beside her, then he sits down and begins typing on his own laptop. The room is dimly lit with maps on the wall and a tripod-mounted camera in the background. A desk lamp illuminates the workspace.
